core_principles: Clarity over Decoration: Content must be legible and structured like a well-designed textbook.
Trust through Color: Deep Green anchors the brand in education and growth.
Action through Red: Red is used ONLY for primary actions (CTAs) to guide the user.
Whitespace as Luxury: Generous padding (p-12, p-24) to create a premium educational feel.

usage_rules.primary: Use for Headings, Borders on active cards, Icons, and Footer background.
usage_rules.accent: Use STRICTLY for 'Sign Up', 'Start Quiz', and 'Get Started' buttons.
usage_rules.surface: Use for section backgrounds (alternating with white) to create rhythm.

layout_strategies.bento_grid: Use for 'Course Structure' and 'Why Choose Us'. Mix col-span-4 and col-span-8 for variety.

buttons.primary: bg-accent hover:bg-accent/90 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-lg font-medium transition-all duration-300

cards.style: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-border p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.pricing: relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl border-2 border-border hover:border-primary transition-colors duration-300

inputs.style: h-12 rounded-lg border-input bg-background px-4 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

icons.preferred_set: BookOpen, GraduationCap, Globe, Languages, CheckCircle2, Star, PlayCircle, ArrowRight

sections_structure.name: Hero
elements: Background Image with Overlay or Video

accessibility_checklist: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
Use semantic HTML (header, main, footer, article, section).
All images must have alt text.
Focus states must be visible (ring-2 ring-primary).
Touch targets must be at least 44x44px.
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text.
Avoid centering long paragraphs. Left align for readability.
Use 'rounded-xl' or 'rounded-2xl' for a modern, friendly academic look.
Buttons should be pill-shaped (rounded-full) to contrast with the rectangular cards.
Input fields should have a distinct focus state with the primary green color.
